primary_problem: VeriPro Energética is managing complex operational and administrative workflows across disconnected tools, resulting in manual handoffs, duplicated data entry, and no clear visibility into where automation can deliver immediate ROI.
desired_outcome: A clear, actionable automation roadmap with prioritised opportunities, estimated ROI per process, and a ready-to-implement architecture plan so the team can move fast without guessing.
automation_platform: n8n (self-hosted or cloud), with integrations to existing stack
current_tools: CRM, email, internal spreadsheets, and industry-specific energy management or billing platforms
trigger_description: Manual triggers (team actions, form submissions, or scheduled intervals) kick off operational processes that currently require human coordination at each step.
process_description: During the audit, every key workflow is mapped end-to-end: data sources, handoff points, decision logic, and error-prone manual steps. Each process is scored by automation feasibility and effort-to-impact ratio.
output_description: A structured Automation Architecture Document covering: current-state workflow maps, automation candidates ranked by priority, proposed integration architecture, tooling recommendations, and a phased implementation roadmap.
notification_description: Findings and the final architecture document are delivered via a recorded walkthrough session plus async written report, so the team can review and act independently.

scope_items.label: Discovery call to map current tools and workflows
Audit of up to 8 core operational processes

out_of_scope: Building or deploying any automations, custom software development, IT infrastructure changes, or processes outside the agreed audit scope.

phases.deliverable: Completed workflow intake form + confirmed list of processes to audit

phases.name: Audit & Analysis
phases.deliverable: Internal analysis of all mapped processes, feasibility scoring, and architecture draft

phases.name: Report & Walkthrough
phases.deliverable: Final Automation Architecture Document + recorded 60-minute walkthrough session

pricing_model_details: Flat-fee engagement. Full scope as described above, one revision round on the final document included.
payment_terms: 50% upfront to begin, 50% on delivery of the final report.
support_period: 7 days of async Q&A after delivery of the final report, via email or WhatsApp.
start_date: Within 3 business days of receiving the first payment instalment.
monthly_recurring_costs: None. This is a one-time audit engagement. Implementation costs (if pursued) would be quoted separately.
roi_details: Identified automation opportunities typically recover the audit investment within the first automated process  -  often within weeks of implementation. The roadmap ensures no engineering time is wasted on low-impact automation.
hours_saved: Estimated 10–20 hours/week once top 3 automations from the roadmap are implemented.
scale_factor: Each automation compounds  -  once infrastructure is in place, adding new workflows costs a fraction of the original effort.
access_requirements: Access to a team member who owns the operational workflows (1–2 hours of their time for the discovery call)
Read-only access or a walkthrough of current tools used (CRM, spreadsheets, energy platform, etc.)
Any existing process documentation, SOPs, or workflow diagrams if available

agreement_terms.title: Scope
agreement_terms.text: This engagement covers a systems audit and automation architecture document as described. Any work outside this scope requires a separate written agreement.

agreement_terms.title: Payment
agreement_terms.text: 50% due before work begins. Remaining 50% due upon delivery of the final report. Work pauses if payment is not received on schedule.

agreement_terms.title: Revisions
agreement_terms.text: One round of revisions to the final Architecture Document is included. Additional revision rounds are billed at €150/hour.

agreement_terms.title: Confidentiality
agreement_terms.text: All information shared by VeriPro Energética S.L. during this engagement is treated as confidential and will not be shared with third parties.

agreement_terms.title: Delivery
agreement_terms.text: Final deliverables will be provided within the agreed timeline, subject to timely receipt of information and access from the client.

agreement_terms.title: Intellectual Property
agreement_terms.text: Upon final payment, all deliverables produced for this project become the property of VeriPro Energética S.L.

upsell_opportunities: Implementation of the top-priority automations identified in the audit (quoted per project); ongoing automation maintenance retainer; monthly workflow optimisation sessions; full AI assistant build (e.g. WhatsApp or internal ops bot).

parts.text:
You are a proposal QA reviewer for a freelance AI consultant. Analyze this HTML proposal for a client and check for:

1. STRUCTURAL: Missing critical sections (cover, scope/deliverables, timeline, pricing, CTA), broken HTML tags, unclosed divs
2. CONTENT: Placeholder text ([CLIENT], lorem ipsum, TBD, TODO, undefined, null), empty sections with no content, obviously duplicated paragraphs
3. PRICING: Price showing as $0 or NaN, missing currency, price in description not matching the pricing section
4. PROFESSIONAL: Client name missing or wrong, company name empty, broken email links

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no explanation:
{"pass": true, "issues": [], "severity": "none"}
OR if issues found:
{"pass": false, "issues": ["description of issue 1"], "severity": "minor|major"}

Only FAIL for issues that would look unprofessional to a paying client.

01 / The Problem

What's Costing You Time

VeriPro Energética S.L. is currently losing productivity to manual processes that don't scale. Based on our discovery conversations:

VeriPro Energética is managing complex operational and administrative workflows across disconnected tools, resulting in manual handoffs, duplicated data entry, and no clear visibility into where automation can deliver immediate ROI.

This is costing your team approximately 10–15 hours per week hours per week in manual work, with additional risk from human error.

02 / The Solution

What We're Building

A clear, actionable automation roadmap with prioritised opportunities, estimated ROI per process, and a ready-to-implement architecture plan so the team can move fast without guessing.

Using n8n (self-hosted or cloud), with integrations to existing stack as the automation backbone, integrated with CRM, email, internal spreadsheets, and industry-specific energy management or billing platforms / eliminating manual touchpoints while giving you full control.

System Flow

Step 01
Trigger
Manual triggers (team actions, form submissions, or scheduled intervals) kick off operational processes that currently require human coordination at each step.
Step 02
Process
During the audit, every key workflow is mapped end-to-end: data sources, handoff points, decision logic, and error-prone manual steps. Each process is scored by automation feasibility and effort-to-impact ratio.
Step 03
Output
A structured Automation Architecture Document covering: current-state workflow maps, automation candidates ranked by priority, proposed integration architecture, tooling recommendations, and a phased implementation roadmap.
Step 04
Notify
Findings and the final architecture document are delivered via a recorded walkthrough session plus async written report, so the team can review and act independently.
03 / Scope of Work

What's Included

✓
Discovery call to map current tools and workflows
✓
Audit of up to 8 core operational processes
✓
Automation feasibility scoring per process
✓
Integration architecture diagram
✓
Prioritised implementation roadmap (3–6 months)
✓
ROI estimate per automation opportunity
✓
60-minute walkthrough of findings and Q&A
×
Implementation of any automations
×
Ongoing support or maintenance
×
Audit of more than 8 processes

Not Included

Building or deploying any automations, custom software development, IT infrastructure changes, or processes outside the agreed audit scope.

04 / Timeline

Delivery Schedule

PhaseDurationDeliverable
Discovery & Intake2–3 daysCompleted workflow intake form + confirmed list of processes to audit
Audit & Analysis3–5 daysInternal analysis of all mapped processes, feasibility scoring, and architecture draft
Report & Walkthrough1–2 daysFinal Automation Architecture Document + recorded 60-minute walkthrough session
Total: 7–10 business days from project kick-off
05 / Investment

Pricing

€ 800
Flat-fee engagement. Full scope as described above, one revision round on the final document included.
Payment Terms50% upfront to begin, 50% on delivery of the final report.
Support Included7 days of async Q&A after delivery of the final report, via email or WhatsApp.
Start DateWithin 3 business days of receiving the first payment instalment.

Ongoing costs (client-side): None. This is a one-time audit engagement. Implementation costs (if pursued) would be quoted separately.

06 / Expected ROI

What You Get Back

Identified automation opportunities typically recover the audit investment within the first automated process - often within weeks of implementation. The roadmap ensures no engineering time is wasted on low-impact automation.

Estimated 10–20 hours/week once top 3 automations from the roadmap are implemented.
Hours Saved / Month
0
Manual Errors
Each automation compounds - once infrastructure is in place, adding new workflows costs a fraction of the original effort.x
Scale Capacity
07 / Requirements

What I Need From You

  • Access to a team member who owns the operational workflows (1–2 hours of their time for the discovery call)
  • Read-only access or a walkthrough of current tools used (CRM, spreadsheets, energy platform, etc.)
  • Any existing process documentation, SOPs, or workflow diagrams if available
08 / Agreement & Terms

Terms of Engagement

Both parties agree to the following terms governing this engagement:

Scope of Work
This proposal defines the complete scope. Any work beyond what is described requires a separate agreement or amendment.
Payment Terms
Payment is due as outlined in the Investment section (50% upfront to begin, 50% on delivery of the final report.). Invoices are due within 14 days of issuance.
Intellectual Property
Upon full payment, all deliverables and custom code become the exclusive property of the Client. Ivan Manfredi retains the right to reference the project in portfolios and case studies (without disclosing confidential data).
Revisions
This engagement includes up to 2 rounds of revisions per deliverable. Additional revision rounds will be quoted separately.
Cancellation
Either party may terminate this agreement with 7 days written notice. Work completed up to the cancellation date will be invoiced proportionally.
Confidentiality
Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary information shared during this engagement. This obligation survives termination of the agreement.

This agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of Italy. Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation before pursuing formal proceedings.
